name: Kou Yamori
about:
Species: Human
Gender: Male
Age: 14 
Occupation: Middle school dropout 
Hair color: Black
Eye color: Black 

Yamori Kou is friendly, liked by most people, and a showcase student. Although he seems to have a successful life, he seems to desire other things. He doesn’t like being the center of attention, lacks the motivation to continue his “perfect student” performance, and has difficulty sympathizing with other students, which leads him to quickly turn away from school life and drop out. He desires to become a vampire and for that, he gets Nanakusa Nazuna to help him but he still doesn’t fully understand the concept of love.

(Source: Yofukashi no Uta Wiki)
